calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony Giraudo, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court noted that the petition contained substantial supporting documentation indicating a birth date of March 11, 1917. Mr. Giraudo confirmed that his family had always celebrated this date as his father's birthday. He stated that his father was born at home in North Beach, San Francisco, to Italian immigrant parents who had only been in the country for a few years and likely did not understand the birth registration requirements.

The court found the evidence sufficient and took the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
